proof: function[T0: lib(neg).Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Real, Real](g, x)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> Real) { x0(x1) + x2(x1) = add_fns[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real](f, x, pointwise_neg[Real, Real](g))
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](f(x), g(x))
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real) { x0(x1) - x2(x1) = sub_fns(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, g)

goal: sub_fns(f, g, x) = add_fns(f, pointwise_neg[Real, Real](g), x)
